Article Text: Bhopal: A molestation case was filed against a married tenant following a complaint by a landlady who alleged that he secretly recorded a video of her while she was in the bathroom. The accused was arrested and his mobile phone was seized.Police said that on Sunday around 12.30 pm, the woman was in the bathroom when she noticed a mobile phone placed at a height inside the bathroom through the ventilator. After coming out, she asked the tenant, to open his room and hand over his phone, which he did. Upon checking the device, the woman found the video and then approached the police to lodge a complaint.
Article Summary: Landlady alleged that he secretly recorded a video of her while she was in the bathroom. The accused was arrested and his mobile phone was seized.
